cards.title: Planned Time Off
cards.bodyHtml:
Planning a trip? Need to just not be here for a little bit?

Heads Up Please ensure you submit these requests 48 hours in advance.

All planned time off requests must be submitted in both ADP and Assembled.

  • In ADP, submit as UTO (unpaid time off).
  • In Assembled, submit as PTO (planned time off).

If you mess up your time off request or need to cancel it, you can remove the request in ADP. Once it is out of ADP, you are free to work your normal shift.

cards.title: Unplanned Time Off
cards.bodyHtml:
Emergencies happen. We understand this.

What We Expect

Submit an absence report through the Slack workflow:

  • Select the appropriate reason: medical/sick, family related, weather related, internet/power outage, late, or other.
  • Double-check that dates are entered correctly.
  • For mid-shift absences, the start and end dates will be the same.
  • Enter the exact time away (the dropdown allows text input for accuracy).
  • Send a quick DM to your lead in case the workflow doesn't populate right away.

Timing requirements:

  • Absences must be reported at least 1 hour before your shift begins.
  • If you leave mid-shift, any absence longer than 5 minutes must be submitted for the actual time missed.

What We Do NOT Expect

You never need to give us the details. If you're not feeling well, that's enough. If you've had an emergency, that's all you need to say. We never expect detailed information from you.
